title: rubus × occiduus var. debilis
intro: Rubus × occiduus var. debilis is a thorny shrub native to the Pacific coast of North America, specifically in the region of California and Oregon, and is characterized by its unique ability to thrive in shaded areas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × occiduus var. debilis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized.
